basic_details.job_title: IIT Indore Laboratory Engineer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Indore (IIT Indore)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Indore (IIT Indore) Laboratory Engineer Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of IIT Indore. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the IIT Indore Laboratory Engineer Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 25 Years Maximum Age: 35 Years

qualification.education_qualification: BE/B. Tech in Mechanical/Electrical engineering with First class.
qualification.details: Laboratory Engineer: BE/B. Tech in Mechanical/Electrical engineering with First class. Experience: 02 years of experience in Makerspace Laboratory/Tinkerers' laboratory/Fab lab/Tool Room/Industry.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Indore Laboratory Engineer Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 15-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Indore to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Indore Laboratory Engineer position?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the IIT Indore Laboratory Engineer recruitment is 15th June 2026. It is advisable to submit your application well before this date.

faq.question: Q2. What are the minimum and maximum age limits for the Laboratory Engineer post?
faq.answer: The minimum age limit for the Laboratory Engineer position is 25 years, and the maximum age limit is 35 years.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Laboratory Engineer role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a BE/B. Tech degree in Mechanical/Electrical engineering with a First Class to be eligible for the Laboratory Engineer position.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Laboratory Engineer post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for the Laboratory Engineer position at IIT Indore.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary range for the Laboratory Engineer position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Laboratory Engineer post will receive a consolidated salary ranging from ₹30,000/- to ₹60,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any experience required for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates need to have 02 years of experience in Makerspace Laboratory/Tinkerers' laboratory/Fab lab/Tool Room/Industry to be eligible.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the IIT Indore Laboratory Engineer recruitment is strictly online.

faq.question: Q8. Does IIT Indore offer age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: The official notification does not specify details regarding age relaxation for reserved categories. It is recommended to check the official PDF for this information.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for the Laboratory Engineer role?
faq.answer: The official notification does not detail the selection process. Candidates are advised to refer to the official notification for comprehensive information on the selection procedure.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: You can find the official notification and the online application link in the "Important Links" section of this article. Please ensure you visit the official website for accurate details.
